meaning: adj.(机件等)多位置的,可在多种位置上使用的,可放在多种位置上的
examples: Introduces a control method of on-line testing in the multiposition loading, and analyses the reliability and safety to on-line testing.
The identification result of the gyro misalignment angle in inertial platform is unsatisfactory for the static multiposition test scheme.
The production of bolts uses advanced high efficiency Z47-24/4 multiposition automatic cold forming lathe, guarantee the sizes, according to GB Standard.
